mapper.select: /* adm-master-application-sql-oracle.xml - selectApplicationCount */ SELECT count(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_AP

/* adm-master-application-sql-oracle.xml - selectApplicationList */
SELECT '0' AS CHK , APKEY , APNM , ISOFFLINE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY AS INSERTURNAME , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY AS UPDATEURNAME FROM TADMIN_MST_AP
